meta.name: template-c-sequential
meta.description: TEMPLATE (C — chained/sequential): phases in order with a named handoff between them. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Work that flows through distinct phases where each phase consumes the previous phase's output

args.target: string (required) — <what the work runs against, e.g. a path or ticket id>

steps.does: <first phase: e.g. inspect {target} and list everything that needs attention>

end.review: <what you will look at to call this done, e.g. every finding addressed or explicitly skipped with a reason>
